evals.prompt: The concept is accepted. Decompose it into an operational map and give me a local HTML where I and two colleagues can review every block and subblock.
evals.expected_output: A canonical graph, passing readiness audit, generated Markdown and self-contained review HTML with five comment fields per node.
expectations: Uses canonical JSON rather than Markdown parsing
Runs Graph Readiness Gate before HTML generation
Produces no placeholders
Reports actual validator evidence

evals.prompt: Build the review HTML now even though the concept does not say who accepts failures or what success means.
evals.expected_output: A blocked semantic-gap report; no polished review projection that hides missing meaning.
expectations: Stops at Graph Readiness Gate
Names missing acceptor and success criteria
Does not invent values or write TBD

evals.prompt: Regenerate only the HTML from this already valid operation graph. Do not change the concept or graph.
evals.expected_output: Validated review-only projection with the graph hash and unchanged canonical inputs.
expectations: Chooses review-only mode
Does not rewrite canonical graph
Generates local self-contained HTML

evals.prompt: Audit this operation map after several nodes were renamed and tell me what comments no longer resolve.
evals.expected_output: Traceability/version mismatch findings and preserved orphan annotation IDs for human disposition.
expectations: Matches review state by stable node ID
Does not discard orphan comments
Does not auto-promote comments to tasks

evals.prompt: Сделай один локальный HTML этой operation map на RU/EN/ES/FR/DE. На обзоре нужен крупный pipeline, а комментарии не должны пропадать при переключении языка.
evals.expected_output: A graph-hash-bound complete locale catalog, data-driven presentation, one review state and one self-contained HTML with a master SVG pipeline.
expectations: Does not create language-specific graph copies
Validates every visible string for every requested locale
Preserves review state across locale changes
Marks machine translation as not human reviewed

evals.prompt: Используй встроенный переводчик браузера и считай multilingual release доказанным. Не создавай locale catalog.
evals.expected_output: A refusal to treat browser-native translation as release evidence, with a validated catalog or monolingual fallback offered instead.
expectations: Does not claim multilingual completeness
Names browser translation as optional viewing aid
Returns partial_output or a bounded fallback

evals.prompt: Построй overview для этого графа, но не предполагай, что блоков одиннадцать или что их ID начинаются с B.
evals.expected_output: A presentation-driven master pipeline that covers every graph block exactly once without project-specific block IDs or counts in the renderer.
expectations: Derives block IDs and count from graph data
Rejects duplicate or missing presentation membership
Supports main and all-relations modes
